value.0: This horrible smelling suit of plate armor is of obvious orcish design.  It offers good protection against all physical attacks though movement is difficult and stealth is impossible.  Due to the weight and size, smaller races will not be able to fit in this armor.
A suit of heavy plate armor.
Large Shield of the Mordor Orc
This wide belt is made of thick leather and studded with iron. It grants the wearer the strength of a giant and the ability to make devastating melee attacks.

Having explored the northlands extensively, a druid named Aawill commissioned the creation of these comfortable boots. Knowing he was heading for the sometimes-dangerous domain of the Neverwinter Woods, Aawill was looking for something helpful in combat, to lighten his need for armor. Since becoming the Archdruid for the Neverwinter Wood's Druid Grove, Aawill has commissioned several, more powerful versions of his original boots.

Suits of hardened leather are created by boiling the leather in water, as the leather cools it shrinks and hardens.  Hardened leather armor is often studded for added protection.
A suit of hardened leather armor.

This longsword is so sharp that it can easily sever limbs off of its victims body.
This blade is a weapon of a servant of Sauron. The dark lord has been up to something, if he places these creature with such weapons in wait for wood-be heroes.
A wicked looking blade of Ethereal quality.
This is the true form of Angurvadal.
This bow grants its weilder a slight resistance to magic.
The Impaler has increased puncture damage compared to other spears.

This is the fully combine Spike of Ixil.

This weapon gives its weilder immunity to any spell that causes weilder to ususally slow down or be stopped. Also it has the ability to stun it's opponent.
This spear grants it's weilder immunity to charm and hold attacks

Wave was made to kill elementals. Initially built to kill Fire Elemental beings this weapon was altered to kill all types of elementals.

This is a Unique Weapon.
